creator: ingeborg@fmgirl.com
text:
Well, this was a huge disappointment.
FreeBSD evidently hasn't entered into this century yet.
First, it took a long time to boot even with the tiny 26MB image.
It asked for all kinds of codepages, but none of them is UTF-8, which is the de-facto standard nowadays.
I chose ISO-8859-1 for Norway, but it did not understand my Norwegian keyboard at all.

I guess this is not the way to go. Really; this is 2016.
